Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Badge of the Brotherhood Turquoise Amulet Unique ID: bb156f02b8320d36356ff807adb944e775bf56b5688ca34eff493c5f5717fa1f Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 16 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Tribal Fury +1% to all maximum Resistances Your Maximum Endurance Charges is equal to your Maximum Frenzy Charges +1 to maximum Fortification per Endurance Charge 8% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge 23% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill 22% chance to lose an Endurance Charge when you gain Fortification Corrupted
